warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket within the period of Monday, 29 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket dalam tempoh Isnin, 29 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Western Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 9:00AM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan, Sarawak Barat dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 9:00 pagi; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, southern part of Bunguran, southern part of Reef South, Labuan, eastern part of Palawan and Sulu until 9:00AM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, selatan Bunguran, selatan Reef South, Labuan, timur Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 9:00 pagi; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang within the period of Tuesday, 30 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang dalam tempoh Selasa, 30 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Langkawi); and  Sarawak:  Serian, Samarahan, Sri Aman (Sri Aman) and Betong (Pusa and Betong) until 9:00AM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Langkawi); dan  Sarawak:  Serian, Samarahan, Sri Aman (Sri Aman) dan Betong (Pusa dan Betong) sehingga 9:00 pagi; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang and Kuala Langat) within the period of 8:00AM; Sunday, 28 June 2026 until 9:00AM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Selangor  (Sabak Bernam, Kuala Selangor, Klang dan Kuala Langat) dalam tempoh 8:00 pagi; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026 sehingga 9:00 pagi; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
